summary: Frontend regression re-verification for StreamKart. All three iteration_2 fixes (currency switching on cards, checkout->/order/{id} navigation, Policy terms INR copy) verified PASS. Full E2E checkout flow works end-to-end.

issues: External CORS error: ipapi.co geo-detect call blocked by CORS (no Access-Control-Allow-Origin). Non-blocking — code already swallows the error and falls back to INR. Consider removing the call or routing through backend.

critical_code_review_comments: currency.jsx: ipapi.co fetch fails via CORS and pollutes console with errors on every fresh visit (no localStorage). Either proxy via backend /api/geo or drop auto-detect.
Checkout.jsx line 25: short-circuit return `if (items.length === 0 && !paid && !submitting) return null;` is fine but redundant with the useEffect guard — both work. Acceptable.

Checkout.jsx: clear() is called AFTER navigate(); since React Router navigate is async-ish in effect terms, cart is cleared on next tick — fine in current behavior but could cause a brief flash if cart UI re-renders. Current ordering is correct for fixing the bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified: (1) ProductCard uses useCurrency().format() — INR ₹1,199 -> USD $14.39 on first card after dropdown switch on Home and persists on /browse. (2) Currency persists in localStorage key 'streamkart_currency_v1'. (3) Checkout flow: add p-001 -> /cart -> /checkout -> fill (Test User, test@example.com, +919999999999) -> Pay -> redirected to /order/{uuid} (NOT /browse) and 'Your library is ready' visible. (4) /policy/terms section index 3 (4. Pricing & Currency) reads 'INR (Indian Rupees) as our base currency'. Note: ipapi.co CORS error is benign — handled by .catch(() => {}).
rca of the issue: n/a — verification only; bugs already fixed by main agent in iteration_2 -> iteration_3 cycle.
